infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Take photos of your meals so the app can estimate calories using your hand as a scale reference.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Import meal photos to estimate their nutrition.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Read your weight and body-fat from Apple Health (including data synced from Renpho).
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Optionally write nutrition data back to Apple Health.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow the app to use the camera to photograph your meals.
